The '''''Misanthrope''''' was a [[Cargo barge|cargo]] [[Starship/Legends|ship]] that crash-landed on [[D'vouran]], a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] that devoured anything it came in contact with. The ''Misanthrope'' was captained by [[Kevreb Bebo|Bebo]], who was, with [[Lonni]] and eighteen other people, a survivor of the encounter.

==Appearances==
*''[[Galaxy of Fear: Eaten Alive]]'' {{1stm}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
